meaning: material unaccounted for [核]物料去向不明损失(量),物料无名损失(量)
examples: The mechanisms of co-condensation, the properties and performance of MUF resin are described in this paper.
The performance data of the pallets made with MUF resin have reached the Werzalit standard for outdoor products.
The time of mechanical ventilation and ICU staying were significantly shorter in MUF group than that in CUF group ( P< 0 05).
